# Roberto E. C. Freitas — Official public profile context

Canonical: https://robertoecf.com/
Primary language: pt-BR
Secondary language: en

## Profile summary
Roberto E. C. Freitas (CFP®) is a financial advisor and strategy/operations professional based in São Paulo, Brazil. He combines wealth management expertise with product/AI operations experience.
